plugins.name: claudit
plugins.description: Audit and optimize Claude Code configurations with dynamic best-practice research

plugins.name: commventional
plugins.description: Enforce conventional commits, conventional comments, and engineering ownership for commits, PRs, and code reviews

plugins.name: skillet
plugins.description: Build, audit, and improve Claude Code skills with research-first architecture and opinionated structure

plugins.name: towncrier
plugins.description: Emit a structured JSON event for every Claude Code hook to a configurable transport (file, fifo, or HTTP).

plugins.name: pronto
plugins.description: Meta-orchestrator for Claude-Code-readiness — audits a repo against a rubric of readiness dimensions and delegates depth scoring to sibling plugins

plugins.name: avanti
plugins.description: SDLC work layer — authors plans, tickets, ADRs, and pulse entries; drives lifecycle transitions; audits SDLC hygiene

plugins.name: lintguini
plugins.description: Audits lint-posture for Claude Code consumer repos: linter config strictness, formatter presence, CI lint enforcement, and rule-suppression count.

plugins.name: inkwell
plugins.description: Audits code-documentation depth for Claude Code consumer repos: README quality, docs coverage, staleness, and internal link health.
